solutions.title: EVO HDD Reference PDF
solutions.description: Quick workshop reference for HDD / EVO procedures. Opens the local file directly or downloads it for later use.

solutions.title: MGU Recovery Walkthrough
solutions.description: A fast, organized walkthrough for in-shop programmers with reference images and short copyable notes.

steps.title: Prepare session files
steps.text: Make sure the required activation files are ready and the device is on a stable power source before starting any programming session.

steps.title: Read the unit and verify identity
steps.text: Read the HU information first, then verify the path is actually MGU before any write or activation.

steps.title: Finalize the procedure
steps.text: After completing the modification, reboot and verify stability and basic functionality, then export the report for the customer.

solutions.title: E-Sys Patch Flow
solutions.description: A simplified walkthrough of the E-Sys workflow with quick reference images.

blocks.value: Start by opening the correct session for the vehicle, then choose the matching target for the model before any CAFD read.

blocks.caption: BimmerFest guide: selecting the correct .prg file

blocks.value: Perform a full read of FA and SVT, then keep a backup before editing any Coding Data.
After reviewing values, write only the required change and verify the operation completed without CAFD errors.
